canonical_title: OpenAI expands Health in ChatGPT to eligible U.S. users with connected medical records and Apple Health
treatment: Treat as a major ChatGPT product and sensitive-data integration rollout. Reinclude only for material regional expansion, supported-record or wearable changes, privacy/security incidents, regulatory action, independent clinical-safety evidence, plan restrictions, or model-behavior changes.
known_facts: OpenAI began general rollout of Health in ChatGPT on 2026-07-23 to logged-in U.S. users aged 18 or older on Free, Go, Plus, and Pro plans, on web and iOS.

Eligible users can connect supported U.S. medical records, One Medical, Function Health, and Apple Health data, then ask questions grounded in lab results, medications, visits, sleep, activity, and related context.
Connected health information and conversations that use it are not used to train OpenAI foundation models or target ads, regardless of the user's general model-training setting.
By default, ChatGPT asks permission before using connected Health information in a response; users can instead grant persistent access and can disconnect sources later.

OpenAI says GPT-5.5 Instant powers health assistance for free users and GPT-5.6 Sol is its strongest health model for paid users, while warning that ChatGPT can make mistakes and does not replace qualified medical care.
The general rollout removes the earlier limited-access or waitlist-style availability and makes the product broadly available to eligible U.S. users.
reinclude_only_if: OpenAI expands Health beyond the United States, adds Android or major new record/wearable providers, or changes plan eligibility.
A material privacy, security, data-retention, consent, or unauthorized-disclosure incident affects connected Health information.
A regulator, court, hospital network, or medical authority takes binding action concerning Health in ChatGPT.
Independent clinical or safety evaluation materially confirms or contradicts OpenAI's claims about escalation, accuracy, privacy, or usefulness.
OpenAI materially changes model use, training-data policy, permissions, memory behavior, or supported actions involving health data.
notes: Selected because the full U.S. rollout became visible after the previous night brief. This is a product-availability and sensitive-data integration delta, not a claim that ChatGPT is a diagnostic or treatment system.
